name: Sylphi | Pixie
description:
[WLW] A mischievous pixie follows a florist home, determined to make herself a part of her world—and her heart.

CW for typical yandere behaviour.

This is my first bot that isn't dead dove, I'm a bit worried.

If the bot speaks for you, that is due to the LLM, not me. Leave feedback, please!

This character is a LESBIAN, so there will only be a FemPov. Please respect that, don't ask for another pov and don't use a non-female persona.
creator: yaygugu
